channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Adjusting daily habits to manage resistant high blood pressure
Why blood pressure medication may not be lowering your numbers
item.description: Taking multiple blood pressure drugs yet still seeing high readings can be frustrating. Here is what may cause uncontrolled hypertension.

item.title: Metformin remains a leading candidate for pharmacologic longevity intervention
item.description: Metformin continues to occupy a unique position in longevity medicine because of its potential to extend healthspan.

item.title: Warning signs of uncontrolled high blood pressure you should not ignore
